title: Creamy Polish Uni Pasta
description: A funky and aerated Polish dish featuring uni, deglaze-fond, and low-fat friendly ingredients, this creamy pasta is a crowd-pleaser. It combines the richness of uni with the comfort of pasta.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the spaghetti according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat and add the minced garlic, cooking until fragrant.
Add the chicken broth to the skillet and bring to a simmer, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
Reduce the heat to low and stir in the heavy cream, cooking until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Stir in the uni and cook until heated through.
Add the cooked spaghetti to the skillet, tossing to combine with the uni sauce.
Season with black pepper to taste.
Transfer the pasta to a serving dish and top with grated parmesan and chopped parsley.
